summary: Paid Labor Integration in Project Financial Results - All tests passed. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Finance tab correctly shows paid labor breakdown with 'Платен труд (реален разход)' in green, warning about paid labor without work_sessions, and cash result using paid labor. No regression on Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати tabs.

issues: Some i18n keys not translated (payroll.payrollRuns, payroll.subtitle) - minor cosmetic issue

seed_data_creation: None - used existing project f5255fdb-337e-4650-a50b-1e9354145257 (Къща_Миро) and paid batch c3ed7745-af58-46d7-8f58-28c81b19d7ff
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paid Labor Integration feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) GET /api/projects/{pid}/financial-results now includes 'labor' field with reported_labor_value, paid_labor_expense, paid_labor_hours, unpaid_approved_labor, labor_expense_basis, allocation_count. 2) Cash result uses paid_labor_expense when available (labor_expense_basis='paid'). 3) Warning 'Има платен труд, но няма отчетен труд от work_sessions' shows correctly when paid labor exists but no work_sessions. 4) Idempotency guard: re-paying paid batch returns 400 'Already paid'. 5) Finance tab shows 'ТРУД' section with 'Платен труд (реален разход)' in green. 6) No regression on Всички отчети, Седмица, Заплати tabs.

backend_apis: Cash result uses paid_labor_expense in cash_out
Warning when paid labor exists but no reported labor
Warning when unpaid approved labor exists
GET /api/payroll-batch/{id}/allocations - returns allocations grouped by project
frontend_ui: Finance tab (Финанси) shows Ликвидност with paid labor in breakdown
ТРУД section shows 'Платен труд (реален разход)' in green with 130 EUR
Warning message 'Има платен труд, но няма отчетен труд от work_sessions' displayed in amber
No regression on 'Всички отчети' tab - reports table working
No regression on 'Седмица' tab - weekly matrix working
No regression on 'Заплати' tab - shows 'Платен' status badge

verified_data.warning_displayed: Има платен труд, но няма отчетен труд от work_sessions
